query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "kvarn: variance-normalized kv-cache quantization mitigates error accum" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the same core mechanism (KV-cache memory overhead and compression) and dependent variable (perplexity degradation) as the user's question regarding KV-cache quantization, even though it employs a different specific technique (GQA-to-MLA transition) rather than variance-normalized quantization.
